caption: Figure 1: Architecture of BVFLMSP.
description2: The architecture of BVFLMSP is diagrammed in Figure 1, illustrating the process of variant filtering and prioritization.

caption: Figure 2: Loss and accuracy curves for two modalities (Clinical + miRNA).

caption: Figure 7: Composition of noise (Bayesian and Embedding output perturbation)
